payload.label: nightstand
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown wooden nightstand with a single visible drawer and a small round metal knob, varnished rectangular top holding a few objects and partially occluded by the bed in the foreground; appears about 0.6 m from the camera.
